title: Playthings of Destiny
writer: Anthony Paul Kelly, Jane Murfin, Laurence Trimble
actors: Anita Stewart, Herbert Rawlinson, Walter McGrail
plot: Julie Leneau, a country schoolteacher in Canada, becomes the bride of Geoffrey Arnold, but her happiness is shattered by a woman named Claire who convinces Julie that she is Arnold's lawful wife. Julie flees and nearly perishes in...
